prompt:
Use case: stylized-concept
Asset type: game terrain atlas reference
Primary request: Limestone Terrace Tiles
Scene/background: plain neutral backdrop only; no fantasy landscape scene
Subject: dry sun-bleached limestone terrace ground modules only, with subtle wear and no props or water
Art direction: ancient Greek oracle sanctuary inspired by Delphi: sacred hillside terraces, solemn ritual atmosphere, premium historical strategy-game concept art
Style/medium: premium painted terrain-module reference for conversion into isometric pixel-art tiles
Composition/framing: clean terrain modules only; extraction-friendly spacing; no decorative props; no poster layout; no diorama scene
Lighting/mood: neutral production lighting with restrained shadowing for downstream conversion
Material language: sun-bleached limestone, weathered marble paving, dry dust, hairline cracks, restrained moss, carved terrace edges
Color palette: warm limestone, sun-bleached marble, terracotta, aged bronze, laurel green, sacred-water blue, parchment neutrals
Constraints: seamless extraction where applicable; no text, no watermark, no modern objects, no logo, no sci-fi, no steampunk, no medieval castle, no Roman imperial monumentality unless explicitly requested, no Christian crosses, no bishop mitres, no Byzantine church imagery, no glossy mobile-game look, no chibi proportions, no toy-like diorama styling; no gradient presentation board; no disconnected floating toy blocks; no candy-colored casual-mobile terrain; no exaggerated bevels; no props, braziers, bowls, columns, statues, roof tiles, or buildings unless explicitly requested; no decorative atlas ornaments
